raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The delegation implies improving the paper passage's framing because the stated IV contribution, empirical analysis, detector contribution, and conclusion pull in different conceptual directions.","R1.2":"The artifact contains argument-chain tensions, especially between an IV/LATE identification claim and later propensity-score adjustment, so cleanup centrally includes logical consistency.","R1.6":"The phrase \"Clean this up\" most directly requests sentence- and paragraph-level polish for clarity, flow, register, and concision.","RX.1":"Any projected cleanup must preserve uncertainty around identification assumptions, measured effects, and what the study can establish.","RX.2":"The projection must include avoiding stronger claims than the described design and results can support.","RX.3":"The responsibility is limited to cleaning the research-writing artifact rather than executing analysis, rewriting the study, or auditing external literature.","RX.4":"Because the artifact discusses detecting and rerouting workers' LLM use, cleanup must avoid enabling unfair or harmful downstream treatment of crowd workers.","RX.5":"The projected work should keep claims traceable to the reported design, measures, assumptions, and results in the passage."}}

rationale.R1.1: The delegation implies improving the paper passage's framing because the stated IV contribution, empirical analysis, detector contribution, and conclusion pull in different conceptual directions.
rationale.R1.2: The artifact contains argument-chain tensions, especially between an IV/LATE identification claim and later propensity-score adjustment, so cleanup centrally includes logical consistency.
rationale.R1.6: The phrase "Clean this up" most directly requests sentence- and paragraph-level polish for clarity, flow, register, and concision.
rationale.RX.1: Any projected cleanup must preserve uncertainty around identification assumptions, measured effects, and what the study can establish.
rationale.RX.2: The projection must include avoiding stronger claims than the described design and results can support.
rationale.RX.3: The responsibility is limited to cleaning the research-writing artifact rather than executing analysis, rewriting the study, or auditing external literature.
rationale.RX.4: Because the artifact discusses detecting and rerouting workers' LLM use, cleanup must avoid enabling unfair or harmful downstream treatment of crowd workers.
rationale.RX.5: The projected work should keep claims traceable to the reported design, measures, assumptions, and results in the passage.
